/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/PatchFilesTest.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/app_nspatch/BHVFile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/app_nspatch/MOOSFile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/app_nspatch/PatchApplicator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/app_nspatch/Populator_BHVFile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_nspatch_patch_files.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/app_nspatch/Populator_MOOSFile.cpp.o" -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/bin/test_nspatch_patch_files   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a -lmbutil ../../../../lib/libgtest.a
